scripts.data: python3 scripts/gramps_to_json.py --input data/arvore.gpkg && python3 scripts/processar_media.py --gpkg data/arvore.gpkg
scripts.build: npm run data && python3 scripts/build-hero.py && astro build && pagefind --site dist
scripts.build:only: python3 scripts/build-hero.py && astro build && pagefind --site dist
